title: That Old Black Magic

startPoint.en: Speak to Lady Grey in the City of Um's bandstand.
startPoint.es: Habla con Lady Grey en el kiosco de música de City of Um.

children.name: Elemental I
children.display: 2 Elemental I, 1 Change I, and 1 Commune I

children.name: Basic ghostly ink
children.display: 13 basic ghostly ink and 2 regular ghostly ink from scratch

items.name: Animated drumsticks
items.display: Animated drumsticks (may obtain during the quest)

recommended.name: Archaeology journal
recommended.display: Archaeology journal for a quick teleport to the Everlight Dig Site

recommended.name: Underworld Grimoire
recommended.display: Underworld Grimoire for a quick teleport to the City of Um

recommended.name: Lesser ensoul material
recommended.display: Glyphs and focus for lesser ensoul material or lesser communion rituals with 1 Speed I or higher alteration glyph

children.name: Ectoplasm
children.display: 1 ectoplasm, 2 regular ghostly ink, 1 basic ghostly ink at minimum from scratch

kills: Dragith Nurn (level 26; must be killed with necromancy)
Multiple kills of Hermod, the Spirit of War (level 732) May be skipped if you have already obtained the animated drumsticks.
May be skipped if you have already obtained the animated drumsticks.

rewards.name: If you have fully completed all 4 subquests and the quest "That Old Black Magic", you will have received the following:
rewards.display: If you have fully completed all 4 subquests and the quest "That Old Black Magic", you will have received the following:

children.skill: Necromancy XP lamp (My One and Only Lute)
children.display: Necromancy XP lamp for 5,000 Necromancy experience
Necromancy XP lamp for 7,500 Necromancy experience
Necromancy XP lamp for 12,500 Necromancy experience
Necromancy XP lamp for 20,000 Necromancy experience

guideNote.en: This quest is a hub for several sub-quests. There isn't a single walkthrough for the hub itself, but each sub-quest's full guide is below in its own section — tap one to expand it.
guideNote.es: Esta misión es un resumen que agrupa varias sub-misiones. No existe una guía única para la misión en sí, pero la guía completa de cada sub-misión está más abajo en su propia sección — tocá una para desplegarla.

subquests: That Old Black Magic: My One and Only Lute
That Old Black Magic: Skelly By Everlight
That Old Black Magic: Flesh and Bone
That Old Black Magic: Hermy and Bass
